_note: Small opt-in list of elite research labs for OpenAlexLabExpander lead-gen. `institution_id` is a bare OpenAlex institution id (precise filter, used when OpenAlex has resolved the lab as its own institution); `affiliation` is a free-text fallback (raw_affiliation_strings search) for labs OpenAlex hasn't resolved separately from their university. Only early-career authors (see OpenAlexScraper.is_early_career) are ever promoted from these.
